sections.paragraph:
μετασχηματίζω [μετά, σχηματίζω ‘assume a position’]

—1. ‘make alteration in appearance’, change Phil 3:21.

—2. ‘make oneself look like’, transform 2 Cor 11: 13-15.

—3. ‘make a pattern in turn’, w. εἰς apply to ταῦτα μετεσχημάτισα εἰς ἐμαυτόν these (considerations, maxims) I use as a pattern for myself 1 Cor 4:6.
